application_insights_id.description: The ID of the Application Insights associated with the machine learning workspace.

container_registry_id.description: The ID of the Azure Container Registry to use for storing Docker images for the machine learning workspace.

description.description: A description for the machine learning workspace.

friendly_name.description: A friendly name for the machine learning workspace, used for display purposes.

high_business_impact.description: Specifies whether the workspace has a high business impact. This is a boolean value.

image_build_compute_name.description: The name of the compute resource used for building Docker images.

key_vault_id.description: The ID of the Azure Key Vault associated with the machine learning workspace.

kind.description: The kind of the machine learning workspace, which can indicate a specific configuration or purpose.

name.description: The name of the machine learning workspace.

primary_user_assigned_identity.description: The principal ID of the user-assigned managed identity to be used by default by the workspace.

public_network_access_enabled.description: Enable public access when this Machine Learning Workspace is behind VNet.

sku_name.description: The SKU name for the workspace, representing the pricing tier.

storage_account_id.description: The ID of the Azure Storage Account associated with the machine learning workspace.

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the machine learning workspace for categorization.

v1_legacy_mode_enabled.description: Indicates if the workspace should operate in legacy mode, which might support older functionality.

encryption.type: list(object({key_vault_id: string, key_id: string, user_assigned_identity_id: string}))

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
